name: @sankaran-8600/component-viewer-v3
description: Modular jQuery plugin for previewing attachments (images, video, audio, PDF, code, markdown, HTML) in a full-screen overlay with zoom/pan, keyboard navigation, carousel, slideshow, and OCR text extraction.

scripts.minify:css: npx cleancss -o component-viewer.min.css component-viewer.css 2>/dev/null || cp component-viewer.css component-viewer.min.css
scripts.minify:modules: mkdir -p src/min && for f in src/*.js; do npx terser "$f" -o "src/min/$(basename ${f%.js}.min.js)" -c -m --comments '/License|Author/'; done
scripts.minify: npm run minify:bundle && npm run minify:css && npm run minify:modules

author: Sankaran N
